case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) VS. MAX J FLORES MENDIZABAL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-29-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES--LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALISTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00 SERVED JUN-17-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES MENDIZABAL, MAX J
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-29-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FOR OPORTUN INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MAX J. FLORES MENDIZABAL. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS RETURNED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES MENDIZABAL, MAX J $1,147.13 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,292.13 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
